summary: A Go-based monolithic application using MCP handlers and a custom runner, heavily augmented by an automated agent system generating extensive extra tests.
patterns: Test-driven development via orchestrated agent commits
concerns: High volume of agent-generated test files (0005-0045) suggests automated scaffolding that may introduce redundant or low-value tests
Scattered extra test files across multiple agent directories instead of co-located with source code
Potential test maintenance burden due to fragmented test organization
suggestions: Consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the standard internal/ and cmd/ test files
Evaluate the quality and coverage value of the orchestrated agent tests
Focus on core logic in runner.go and handlers.go rather than expanding edge-case tests
